---
title: "MP041: Configuration-Driven UI Composition"
subtitle: "UI 組件應從配置檔案動態生成，UI 結構和行為定義為將配置轉換為組件的函數組合"
author: "System"
date: "2025-04-07"
date-modified: "2025-08-17"
categories: [meta-principle, ui-architecture, configuration, functional-programming]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
crossref:
  chapters: true
---

## Core Concept

[This principle needs to be translated from the Chinese version]

## Key Principles

1. **Principle 1**: [To be added]
2. **Principle 2**: [To be added]
3. **Principle 3**: [To be added]

## Implementation Guidelines

[Implementation details to be added]

## Examples

```r
# Example code to be added
```

## Related Principles

## Benefits

1. **Benefit 1**: [To be added]
2. **Benefit 2**: [To be added]
3. **Benefit 3**: [To be added]

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Checklist item 1
- [ ] Checklist item 2
- [ ] Checklist item 3

## Conclusion

[Conclusion to be added]
